name: GROUNDS R.EST. NA O.N.
summary: The Grounds Real Estate Development AG develops and manages residential properties in Germany. It engages in the trading and long-term ownership of commercial and residential properties in Germany. The company primarily develops temporary accommodation, age-appropriate housing, nursing care facilities, and hotels and holiday properties. The company was incorporated in 2007 and is based in Berlin, Germany. The Grounds Real Estate Development AG is a subsidiary of Red Rock Wealth Management Limited.
